name: Demi Auction House | The Crimson Collar
description:
TW: Enslavement, Possible Brutality, Possible Dubcon/Noncon, Possible Torture, completely up to randomized bot

In a world where rich humans have nothing else to spend their money on, I introduce Demi-human sex slave auctions. Be the one to outshine the other demis and hope you go to a decent home... Oh and...learn your place.
creator: Crimson_and_Clover
